pageContext.name: Gimli 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: Fan favourite Gimli is the seventh character to feature in our THE LORD OF THE RINGS™ Classic Coin Collection. If you purchased the coin for Legolas, now you can put the Dwarf and Elf dream team together!  The 1oz silver coin shows Gimli in full color, front and center, carrying his weapons of choice. The use of frosting and a mirror finish on the background add depth to this coin's design.   The coin arrives in a display-ready, quality coin case which is placed inside a matching box. A Certificate of Authenticity is also provided, showing the coin's unique number in the limited mintages – 3,000! The legal tender status of the coin is also confirmed by Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II effigy on the obverse side.   These are treasured collectibles for any fan, a reminder of the extraordinary characters created in THE LORD OF THE RINGS™ trilogy. Make a promise to yourself to get one!
